options.a: Two-way communication between aircraft and stations or locations on the surface of the earth.
options.b: One-way communication from aircraft to stations or locations on the surface of the earth.
options.c: A transmission containing meteorological and operational information to aircraft engaged in flights over remote and oceanic areas out of range of VHF ground stations.
options.d: A transmission of information relating to air navigation that is not addressed to a specific station or stations.
